name: @axona/protocol
description: Pure-JS protocol kernel for the Axona peer-to-peer mesh. Contracts (DHT, Transport, BootstrapService), the per-node AxonaPeer implementation (NH-1 routing + axonal pub/sub), and supporting helpers. No simulator dependencies; runs in browsers and Node.

scripts.test: node test/smoke_s2.js && node test/smoke_addressing.js && node test/smoke_errors.js && node test/smoke_persistence_inmemory.js && node test/smoke_persistence_file.js && node test/smoke_persistence_indexeddb.js && node test/smoke_identity.js && node test/smoke_transport_sim.js && node test/smoke_transport_web.js && node test/smoke_transport_web_full.js && node test/smoke_transport_web_reconnect.js && node test/smoke_transport_node.js && node test/smoke_handshake.js && node test/smoke_pubsub_unified.js && node test/smoke_envelope.js && node test/smoke_pull_metrics.js && node test/smoke_direct.js && node test/smoke_mesh.js && node test/smoke_health.js && node test/smoke_join_leave.js && node test/smoke_snapshot.js && node test/smoke_persistence_wiring.js && node test/smoke_post_ed25519.js
